programmes.show_description: 2/3. Tir meets with island police and is given CCTV footage that has never been released. Contains some scenes which some viewers may find upsetting.

programmes.show_name: P Diddy: The Rise and Fall
programmes.show_description: Yinka Bokinni explores the life of Sean Combs, now jailed on prostitution-related charges. Contains very strong language and some upsetting scenes.
